raw.message:
LINEレンジャー×デッドアカウントのスペシャルイベントを無料で楽しもう✨
今ならログインするだけで漆栖川希詠のレンジャーがもらえる！

hook.summary: Introduction of a collaboration character from 'Dead Account' alongside gameplay footage.
hook.visual_action: A chibi character stands centered while a gameplay window in the background shows a battle scene.
hook.text_overlay: コラボ限定レンジャーと

scene_flow: Introduction of the lead collaboration character with a gameplay window.
Reveal of the full lineup of collaboration characters.
Gameplay montage showing the characters' special abilities and combat.
Final splash screen with the collaboration title and 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: コラボ限定レンジャーと
LINE Rangers x デッドアカウント
audience_proxy: Japanese mobile gamers who are fans of the 'Dead Account' manga series and enjoy casual tower defense games.
